headline: UBS Maintains Buy Rating on Amphenol (APH)
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. On April 14, 2026, UBS lowered its price target on Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) to $170 from $174 and maintained a Buy rating. The firm said valuations have become more reasonable after turning cautious following Q4 results and 2026 guidance, […]
